name: QA 776
description:
PCP QA Test No. 776

Test using the pmfind app to find pmcd servers using the active probing

discovery mechanism



Copyright (c) 2014-2015 Red Hat.  All Rights Reserved.



**To reproduce this test, please run:**

    build/ci/ci-run.py centos7-container reproduce
